SLAA610 Research and Theories in Second Language Acquisition (3 Credits)

Introduction to current theories and research findings Second Language Acquisition (SLA).

SLAA611 Fundamentals of Foreign Language Acquisition and Instruction (3 Credits)

Introduction to theoretical and practical issues relevant to foreign language learning, language acquisition, and curriculum construction.
